title: National Theatre at Home: The Grapes of Wrath
original_title: National Theatre Live: The Grapes of Wrath
overview: Forced to travel West in search of a promised land, the Joad family embark on an epic journey across America in the hope of finding work and a new life in California.  Their story is one of false hopes, wrong turns and broken dreams, but also a hymn to human kindness and a tribute to the endurance of the human spirit.
